Container.Name: obscura
Container.Overview: Lightweight Rust headless browser with remote CDP access. Obscura uses ~30 MB RAM vs ~200 MB for Chrome. Exposes Chrome DevTools Protocol (CDP) on port 9223, rewritten for remote access via nginx — compatible with Playwright, Puppeteer, and any CDP client.

Config.Name: CDP Port
Config.Description: Chrome DevTools Protocol endpoint. Connect Playwright or any CDP client to http://[IP]:9223
